html:
Exclusive to:  

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Deciduous Turf is one of the Turf items that appears in the Don't Starve Together. It commonly found in Deciduous Forest. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as fuel.

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Lureplants, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can be planted these Turfs. It will not stop the Lureplants' Eyeplants from spawning.

When placed on the Surface World in a large enough area, Crows are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs.

Deciduous Turf can be crafted and prototyped with 1 Twigs and 1 Birchnut at Terra Firma Tamper in the Decorations Filter.

Gallery

  • Deciduous Turf texture.
  • Wilson standing on Deciduous Turf.
  • Deciduous Turf as seen on the Map.
TurfsCraftable Items

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Lureplants, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can be planted these Turfs. It will not stop the Lureplants' Eyeplants from spawning.
When placed on the Surface World in a large enough area, Crows are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đất Rụng Lá là một trong những vật phẩm Đất xuất hiện trong Don't Starve Together. Nó thường được tìm thấy trong Rừng Rụng Lá. Giống như các loại Đất khác, nó có thể được đặt trên bất kỳ nền đất trống nào hoặc dùng làm nhiên liệu.

{{Scrapbook Info|Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.}}
'''Deciduous Turf''' is one of the [[Turf]] items that appears in the ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It commonly found in [[Deciduous Forest]]. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or used as [[Fire#Fuel|fuel]].

Plants like [[Berry Bush]]es, [[Grass Tuft]]s, [[Saplings]], [[Spiky Bush]]es, [[Lureplant]]s, [[Pine Cone]]s, and [[Birchnut]]s can be planted these Turfs. It will not stop the Lureplants' [[Lureplant#Eyeplant|Eyeplants]] from spawning.

When placed on the [[Surface World]] in a large enough area, Crows are the only [[Birds]] that will spawn and land on these turfs.

Deciduous Turf can be crafted and prototyped with 1 [[Twigs]] and 1 [[Birchnut]] at [[Terra Firma Tamper]] in the [[Decorations Filter]].
